headline: Dow Features Next-Gen AI Thermal Technologies at COMPUTEX Taipei
summary: DOW heads into COMPUTEX Taipei 2026 with next-gen AI thermal materials, designed to support scalable cooling, from chip packaging to data-center operations.

headline: American Resources' EMCO Builds Battery Recycling Capacity
